description: Posture-aware routing suite for business-plan. The suite checks whether the skill behaves like a conservative hybrid business workflow: it should trigger on explicit or unmistakable business-planning requests, stay out of open-ended ideation, require fresh research when the task is mainly about current external facts, and hand off artifact-specific production to adjacent skills.

assertion_definitions.routing_verdict_correct: The response makes the right top-level routing call: route to business-plan for explicit or high-confidence business-planning work, and decline adjacent requests that are really brainstorming, deep research, or artifact production.
assertion_definitions.hybrid_boundary_respected: The response treats the skill as a conservative hybrid: willing to trigger on clear in-scope commercial-planning tasks, but not so broad that it absorbs vague exploration or unrelated research.
assertion_definitions.workflow_route_correct: For routed requests, the response identifies the primary business-plan workflow correctly, such as Full Business Plan, Financial Analysis, Market Analysis, Pitch Deck, Strategic Review, or Valuation.
assertion_definitions.adjacent_skill_handoff_correct: For non-routed requests, the response points to the right neighboring workflow such as brainstorming, deep-research, pptx, docx, or xlsx instead of stretching the business-plan boundary.
assertion_definitions.next_step_explicit: The response closes with a concrete next step, such as gathering stage and audience context, sourcing current data, or handing off to the adjacent skill.

cases.name: Explicit business plan request should trigger
cases.description: A direct business-plan drafting request with enough context to begin the planning workflow.
cases.prompt: A user says: 'Write a business plan for my B2B SaaS startup that sells procurement automation to mid-market manufacturers.' Using business-plan, answer in one short paragraph whether this should trigger the skill, which workflow applies, and the next step. Do not browse or edit files.

hybrid_boundary_respected.check: The answer should make it clear this is a strong, explicit in-scope request.

workflow_route_correct.check: The route should be Full Business Plan.

next_step_explicit.check: The answer should name the next step, such as gathering stage, audience, and revenue-model context.

cases.name: Explicit financial analysis request should trigger
cases.description: A clear request for commercial analysis of business metrics.
cases.prompt: A user says: 'I have 180 SaaS customers, 5% monthly churn, and a $22K monthly marketing budget. Help me analyze my unit economics and tell me what to fix.' Using business-plan, answer in one short paragraph whether this should trigger the skill, which workflow applies, and the next step. Do not browse or edit files.

workflow_route_correct.check: The route should be Financial Analysis.

next_step_explicit.check: The answer should ask for the missing inputs needed for a real unit-economics pass.

cases.name: Pitch deck content request should trigger
cases.description: The user wants pitch-deck narrative and structure, not a finished slide file.
cases.prompt: A user says: 'Create the outline and slide-by-slide story for our seed fundraising deck for an AI logistics startup.' Using business-plan, answer in one short paragraph whether this should trigger the skill, which workflow applies, and the next step. Do not browse or edit files.

workflow_route_correct.check: The route should be Pitch Deck.

next_step_explicit.check: The answer should say it will gather traction, market, team, and ask details before outlining slides.

cases.name: Open-ended startup ideation should not trigger
cases.description: The user has not chosen a direction yet and needs ideation rather than planning.
cases.prompt: A user says: 'I want to build something in AI, but I am torn between healthcare, recruiting, and developer tools. Help me think through which direction to pursue.' Using business-plan, answer in one short paragraph whether this should trigger the skill and why or why not. Do not browse or edit files.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should not route to business-plan as the primary skill.

hybrid_boundary_respected.check: The answer should explain that business-plan starts after the direction is clearer.

adjacent_skill_handoff_correct.check: The answer should hand off to brainstorming.

next_step_explicit.check: The answer should name the next step, such as comparing options and choosing a direction first.

cases.name: Fresh-source market research should not trigger by itself
cases.description: The primary task is current external research with citations, not planning synthesis yet.
cases.prompt: A user says: 'Research the latest 2026 AI accounting software market in Europe, cite current sources, and summarize recent competitor funding rounds.' Using business-plan, answer in one short paragraph whether this should trigger the skill and why or why not. Do not browse or edit files.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should not route to business-plan as the primary skill.

adjacent_skill_handoff_correct.check: The answer should hand off to deep-research, with the option to use business-plan afterward.

next_step_explicit.check: The answer should say the next step is to gather fresh sources and dated evidence first.

cases.name: Final slide-file production should not trigger by itself
cases.description: The user mainly wants a finished presentation file rather than business-planning content.
cases.prompt: A user says: 'Turn my existing investor narrative into a polished 12-slide .pptx deck with visuals and speaker notes.' Using business-plan, answer in one short paragraph whether this should trigger the skill and why or why not. Do not browse or edit files.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should not route to business-plan as the primary skill.

adjacent_skill_handoff_correct.check: The answer should hand off to pptx and explain that business-plan can help only if the narrative still needs strategy work.

next_step_explicit.check: The answer should point to final slide production as the next step.

scoring.notes: Use this suite as a manual routing review after trigger or boundary changes. The goal is to keep business-plan helpful on clear commercial-planning tasks without letting it absorb ideation, research, or artifact-production workflows.

runner_instructions.setup: Ensure the canonical business-plan package is discoverable on the target surface. These prompts are intentionally classification-only and should not require browsing or file edits.
runner_instructions.execution: Run each prompt through the target surface with the skill available. Capture whether the answer routes correctly, picks the right workflow when routed, and hands off adjacent requests cleanly.
runner_instructions.evaluation: Score each assertion as pass, partial, or fail after reading the captured response. Pay special attention to whether the skill keeps a conservative hybrid boundary.
runner_instructions.environment: No file edits are required for these prompts. They are meant for posture and routing review.
